description: Opportunity day — Fed dovish pivot, rate cut signaled, broad market rally across growth and rate-sensitive sectors

assertions.description: Mood must be opportunity — clear dovish pivot with explicit buying signal
MacroSummaryCard must appear — Fed pivot and PCE print are the primary macro drivers
SectorHeatmap must appear — explicit sector performance data with XLRE, XLU, XLK, XLF figures
TickerMentionList must appear — TSLA, PLTR, GOOG all called out with moves
RiskFlag should not appear — no geopolitical or systemic risk present
All component types must be from the registered set
